hacker_news.title: Pocketpy: Portable Python 3.x interpreter written in C11
hacker_news.author: klaussilveira
hacker_news.summary: Portable Python 3.x Interpreter in Modern C for Game Scripting - pocketpy/pocketpy

linked_context.page_title: GitHub - pocketpy/pocketpy: Portable Python 3.x Interpreter in Modern C for Game Scripting
linked_context.page_description: Portable Python 3.x Interpreter in Modern C for Game Scripting - pocketpy/pocketpy
linked_context.page_excerpt:
pocketpy is a portable Python 3.x interpreter, written in C11. It aims to be an alternative to Lua for game scripting, with elegant syntax, powerful features and competitive performance. pocketpy has no dependencies other than the C standard library, which can be easily integrated into your C/C++ project. Developers are able to write Python bindings via C-API or pybind11 compatible interfaces.

Please see https://pocketpy.dev for details and try the following resources.

pkpy should work on any platform with a C11 compiler. These platforms are officially tested.

hacker_news.title: NetBSD GSoC 2026 Reports: Testing Compat Linux: Syscall Testing
hacker_news.author: jaypatelani
hacker_news.summary:
This report was written by Henrique Brito as part of Google Summer of Code 2026.

NetBSD is capable of executing Linux compiled binaries through a thin, in-kernel translation layer, compat_linux, which, among many other things, is responsible for ‘capturing’ the syscalls made by the program and calling a stub, which is responsible for generating the expected output and behavior. Generally this stub ends up calling the NetBSD version of the syscall and translating the results...

The goal is to use LTP, the already known and battle-tested Linux test suite, to check how close compat_linux is to a native Linux system. Focusing on the syscall aspect of it.

hacker_news.title: Can You 'Catch' Dementia from Your Spouse? By StudyFinds Analysis •
hacker_news.author: joe_the_user
hacker_news.summary: Study of nearly 1 million married people found that when one spouse develops dementia, the other's risk climbs about 70 percent.

linked_context.page_title: Can You 'Catch' Dementia From Your Spouse?
linked_context.page_description: Study of nearly 1 million married people found that when one spouse develops dementia, the other's risk climbs about 70 percent.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
Marriage means sharing a home, a bed, daily routines, and decades of memories. A large new study out of Taiwan points to something far less welcome that some couples may share: a raised risk of dementia itself.

Researchers who followed nearly a million married people found that when one spouse was diagnosed with dementia, the other partner became markedly more likely to develop it too, on the order of 70 percent more likely. Published in JAMA Network Open in July 2026, the work ranks among the largest ever done on what scientists call spousal dementia concordance, and it raises a pressing question for...

Dementia is not contagious in any ordinary sense. Researchers instead point to several overlapping causes, among them shared homes, similar lifelong diets and habits, and the heavy strain of caring full-time for a partner whose brain is failing. Stress, lost sleep, depression, and isolation all wear on brain health, and caring for a spouse with dementia can pile on all of them at...

hacker_news.title: Bringing the modern web to the original iPad mini
hacker_news.author: seg6
hacker_news.summary: resurrecting ios 6 with a remote browser

linked_context.page_title: bringing the modern web to the original ipad mini — seg6
linked_context.page_description: resurrecting ios 6 with a remote browser
linked_context.page_excerpt:
I recently visited my parents and found the first generation iPad mini they bought me when I was ten years old. More than a decade later, it is still a beautiful piece of hardware. Small, light, sturdy, the kind of device Apple used to make before every screen became a laptop replacement.

Then I turned it on and remembered why I stopped using it: It was running iOS 9.3.5, which is brutal on the A5 chip. Every tap had weight, animations stuttered, opening an app felt like an eternity. Apple really killed this device with iOS 9.

Still, I felt like the hardware was too beautiful to leave in a drawer. I wanted to turn it into a smooth, distraction free reading device.

hacker_news.title: Supabase Pipelines is now in Public Alpha
hacker_news.author: jlaneve
hacker_news.summary: Supabase Pipelines is now in public alpha with schema change support, a faster initial sync, and a new destination request form for ClickHouse, Snowflake, and DuckLake.

linked_context.page_title: Supabase Pipelines is now in Public Alpha
linked_context.page_description: Supabase Pipelines is now in public alpha with schema change support, a faster initial sync, and a new destination request form for ClickHouse, Snowflake, and DuckLake.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
Today we're moving Supabase Pipelines into public alpha. The biggest addition is schema change support: Pipelines can now detect supported schema changes in your source tables and apply them to the destination automatically. This release also brings a faster initial sync and a new destination request form for ClickHouse, Snowflake, and DuckLake.

Supabase Pipelines replicates your Supabase Postgres data to external analytical systems in near real time. It is powered by Supabase ETL , our open source change-data-capture pipeline written in Rust. Supabase ETL reads changes from Postgres through logical replication, copies existing table data, streams inserts, updates, deletes, and truncates, and writes them to your destination.

The first destination available to everyone in public alpha is Google BigQuery .

hacker_news.title: Baba Is Solved by Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol, but at what cost?
hacker_news.author: agluszak
hacker_news.summary: We ported the puzzle game Baba Is You to the Harbor framework, and benchmarked current models, including Claude, GPT, Gemini, GLM, and DeepSeek. A human Twitch streamer is 4x faster than Claude Fable 5.

linked_context.page_title: Baba Is Solved by Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol, but at what cost? - Quesma Blog
linked_context.page_description: We ported the puzzle game Baba Is You to the Harbor framework, and benchmarked current models, including Claude, GPT, Gemini, GLM, and DeepSeek. A human Twitch streamer is 4x faster than Claude Fable 5.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
We tested GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Fable 5, among other models, on the first 2 stages of Baba Is You. While they are able to solve almost all levels, it took them significantly longer than humans.

While AI might overtake humans in tasks , it is not always cost-effective. That is the opposite of everyday software development, where agents tend to overestimate their own effort — see I am sorry Dave, it will take 3 days .

There were surprises — for example, Gemini 3.5 Flash was 2.4x more expensive than Fable 5 to solve The Intro stage. Or that a more “budget” GPT-5.6 Terra was actually 2.9x more costly than Sol.

top_trends.author: klaussilveira

linked_context.page_title: GitHub - pocketpy/pocketpy: Portable Python 3.x Interpreter in Modern C for Game Scripting
linked_context.page_description: Portable Python 3.x Interpreter in Modern C for Game Scripting - pocketpy/pocketpy
linked_context.page_excerpt:
pocketpy is a portable Python 3.x interpreter, written in C11. It aims to be an alternative to Lua for game scripting, with elegant syntax, powerful features and competitive performance. pocketpy has no dependencies other than the C standard library, which can be easily integrated into your C/C++ project. Developers are able to write Python bindings via C-API or pybind11 compatible interfaces.

Please see https://pocketpy.dev for details and try the following resources.

pkpy should work on any platform with a C11 compiler. These platforms are officially tested.

named_hotspots.name: code-review-graph
named_hotspots.what_happened: GitHub 开源项目 'code-review-graph' 今日获得大量关注，单日新增 1921 颗星，总星数已达 24489。该项目定位为面向 MCP 和 CLI 的本地优先代码智能图谱工具。
named_hotspots.core_details: 该项目是一个用 Python 编写的工具，旨在为代码库构建一个持久化的知识图谱。其核心功能是让 AI 编程工具（如代码助手）在进行分析或审查时，能够只读取与当前任务最相关的代码上下文，而非整个代码库。项目声称已在代码审查和大仓库工作流等场景中，通过基准测试验证了其能显著减少所需的上下文量。项目由 tirth8205 等人创建和维护。
named_hotspots.ai_take: 该项目直接针对当前 AI 编程助手（如 Copilot、Claude Code）面临的核心挑战之一——上下文窗口限制与代码库规模之间的矛盾。通过构建一个结构化的、可查询的代码图谱，它试图让 AI 更“智能”地理解代码间的关联，从而提升代码理解、审查和生成的效率与准确性。这代表了从“向 AI 抛送大量原始文本”到“为 AI 提供精炼知识结构”的演进思路。
named_hotspots.hype_check: 热度很高。单日近 2000 星的涨幅和超过 2.4 万的总星数，表明其精准击中了开发者社区对提升 AI 编码工具效用的迫切需求。‘本地优先’和‘减少上下文’的定位在当前注重隐私和效率的开发者环境中尤其具有吸引力。
named_hotspots.value_check: 潜在价值显著。如果其宣称的上下文减少效果能在实际复杂项目中稳定复现，将直接降低 AI 编码的算力与时间成本，并可能提升代码审查等任务的质量。其作为基础设施工具，有望与多种现有 AI 编码工具链集成。价值实现的关键在于图谱构建的准确性、查询效率以及与实际开发工作流的无缝结合。
named_hotspots.follow_up:

source_briefs.item_name: Pocketpy: Portable Python 3.x interpreter written in C11
source_briefs.content_summary: pocketpy是一个用C11编写的便携式Python 3.x解释器，旨在成为游戏脚本中Lua的替代品。它具有优雅的语法、强大的功能和有竞争力的性能。除了C标准库外没有其他依赖，可以轻松集成到C/C++项目中。开发者可以通过C-API或与pybind11兼容的接口编写Python绑定。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 将Python引入游戏脚本领域是一个有趣的方向，可能降低游戏逻辑开发的学习曲线，但其性能与生态适配性将是关键挑战。

source_briefs.item_name: Almost Went Back: One Month on NixOS
source_briefs.content_summary: 这是作者“Linux Odyssey”系列文章的第二部分，详细记录了使用NixOS一个月后的体验。在最初的新鲜感过后，作者遇到了信心危机，深陷于学习flakes、home-manager、各种配置方法的差异以及整个项目的哲学理念之中。他遭遇了多个“陷阱”，经历了漫长的调试过程，并感受到了实现同一目标有无限种方法所带来的沉重负担。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 文章反映了NixOS这类声明式、可复现系统在带来强大功能的同时，也存在陡峭的学习曲线和配置复杂性，是开发者采用时需权衡的实际问题。

source_briefs.item_name: Antares: Highly Efficient Open Weight AI Models for Vulnerability Localization
source_briefs.content_summary: 思科（Cisco）发布了Antares系列安全小语言模型（SLMs），专门用于解决安全领域中最困难、最耗时且成本高昂的问题之一：在代码库中精确定位已知漏洞的位置。他们开源了Antares-350M和Antares-1B两个模型。基准测试表明，这些模型在此关键安全任务上的表现优于许多强大的闭源和开源模型，且成本仅为前者的一小部分。模型足够紧凑，可以在本地运行，无需将敏感代码库发送到第三方。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 针对特定安全任务（漏洞定位）定制化的小模型是AI落地的重要趋势，在效率、成本和数据隐私方面相比通用大模型具有显著优势。

source_briefs.item_name: 6,600 noncitizens were registered to vote in N.J. because of a ‘software error,’ governor says - NBC News
source_briefs.content_summary: 美国新泽西州州长表示，由于一个“软件错误”，该州有6600名非公民被登记为选民。相关报道指出，其中近400人实际上投了票。该事件已被纠正，相关人员已从选民名册中清除。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 此事件凸显了选举管理软件系统可靠性的极端重要性，一个技术错误可能直接冲击选举的公正性与公信力，是技术与公共治理交叉领域的典型案例。

source_briefs.item_name: Tankers with Saudi crude turn back as Houthis open new front in US-Iran war - Reuters
source_briefs.content_summary: 路透社报道，由于也门胡塞武装在红海区域开辟了针对美国-伊朗冲突的新战线，多艘载有沙特原油的油轮已掉头返航。相关分析指出，胡塞武装的封锁威胁可能加剧本已脆弱的石油市场局势，并对全球能源供应链构成风险。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 地缘政治冲突通过关键航道直接影响全球能源物流与市场，体现了现代战争中非国家行为体利用不对称手段（如航道封锁）影响全球经济的能力。

source_briefs.item_name: Cornyn threatens to block Trump’s ambassadors over AIDS prevention funding - Politico
source_briefs.content_summary: 美国参议员约翰·科宁（John Cornyn）威胁要阻止特朗普提名的多位大使任命，以迫使政府解冻用于艾滋病预防项目（PEPFAR）的资金。此举将影响包括道格·马斯特里亚诺（Doug Mastriano）被提名为斯洛伐克大使在内的多项人事任命。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 这反映了美国国内政治中，外交人事任命常被用作国内政策博弈的筹码，公共卫生项目的资金问题与外交事务产生了直接联动。

summary.closing_note: 总体来看，今日热点凸显了AI开源项目正从基础模型向工具层和应用层快速渗透，尤其在代码智能、信息聚合与辅助决策等领域涌现出大量高关注度实践。开发者社区对提升AI工具效率、降低使用门槛及改善用户体验的需求持续驱动创新，但实际部署中的稳定性、数据准确性及生态整合仍是后续验证关键。建议持续关注这些项目的版本迭代与社区反馈，以把握AI工程化落地的真实进展。
